title: EVANGELION BD BOX Standard Edition Information Pics
display_title: EVANGELION BD BOX Standard Edition Information Pics
wikitext:
[]: EVANGELION BD-BOX Standard Edition Information + Pics             Quote Post by Hakyra » Wed Nov 06, 2019 4:39 pm Hello Everyone, Today i Recieved my BD copy of Neon Genesis Evangelion Standard Edition from Amazon Japan and since i haven't seen much information about this edition on the net, i decided to share some pics and information of the Release. First off, this is a pretty simple box. No colors, no fancy images, nothing. Just a Blue cardboard box, nothing special, the box has a glossy finish. Inside the Cardboard box is a Black Bluray Multi-case, once again, just a single color, with the logo in Blue, nothing else. The discs are splited into compartments, they are very easy to take out and put in. It also contains a Booklet, it's pretty short, contains information about the Discs and the 8 illustrations that were used on the Genesis video releases ages ago. The information of the Blu-rays comes in a sticker, it's glued to the protective plastic, since i'm afraid to break it, i cut it with my hands and i left it untouched on the bluray case. Unfortunatly it came with a black bars sticker, i can't remove it. i apologize for the inconvinience: The contents of the Discs are exactly the same as the 2015 Box Set, so i won't talk about them since everyone has posted information before about them. Ah, one thing that i haven't seen clarifed anywhere, The Blu-Ray Discs ARE REGION FREE. I live in Europe and we have Region B. They play fine on my PS4 Pro and PS3 Super Slim. I'm saying this because Amazon says Region A/1, and Blu-ray Forums is left as untested. If you live outside of Region A don't worry, they don't have any region locking whatsoever. That's everything from now, if you have any questions, just leave a comment!

[]: Re: EVANGELION BD-BOX Standard Edition Information + Pics             Quote Post by MuscleRobo » Wed Nov 06, 2019 4:50 pm Do they have subtitles? I've picked up some series that had english subtitles based on american sets like Planetes and some series that didn't have a western release had english subs as well like Macross Frontier.

[]: Re: EVANGELION BD-BOX Standard Edition Information + Pics             Quote Post by Hakyra » Wed Nov 06, 2019 5:11 pm MuscleRobo wrote: Do they have subtitles? I've picked up some series that had english subtitles based on american sets like Planetes and some series that didn't have a western release had english subs as well like Macross Frontier.

[]: Re: EVANGELION BD-BOX Standard Edition Information + Pics             Quote Post by Joseki » Thu Nov 07, 2019 11:11 am Are you sure the content is the same? I read there were some minor differences in the extras.

[]: Re: EVANGELION BD-BOX Standard Edition Information + Pics             Quote Post by Hakyra » Thu Nov 07, 2019 12:52 pm Joseki wrote: Are you sure the content is the same? I read there were some minor differences in the extras.

[]: Re: EVANGELION BD-BOX Standard Edition Information + Pics             Quote Post by robersora » Thu Nov 07, 2019 5:41 pm Thanks, now I finally know how they look!

[]: Re: EVANGELION BD-BOX Standard Edition Information + Pics             Quote Post by Joseki » Thu Nov 07, 2019 5:43 pm Hakyra wrote: As far as i know, the contents are identical, but i'm not 100% sure of it. Where did you read this? i'm curious now... If someone that owns both editions could confirm this, it would be really helpful!!

[]: Re: EVANGELION BD-BOX Standard Edition Information + Pics             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Sat Nov 23, 2019 12:56 pm Thanks for the pictures!

[]: Re: EVANGELION BD-BOX Standard Edition Information + Pics             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Tue Dec 31, 2019 4:47 pm Thanks so much for the information! I'm thinking of picking up this Standard Edition at some point down the line. Do you happen to know if it looks decent on a 4K TV? I'm assuming it's just in 1080.

[]: Re: EVANGELION BD-BOX Standard Edition Information + Pics             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Tue Dec 31, 2019 8:32 pm That depends entirely on your 4K TV and BD player.

[]: Re: EVANGELION BD-BOX Standard Edition Information + Pics             Quote Post by Hakyra » Thu Jan 02, 2020 10:25 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: Thanks so much for the information! I'm thinking of picking up this Standard Edition at some point down the line. Do you happen to know if it looks decent on a 4K TV? I'm assuming it's just in 1080.

[]: Re: EVANGELION BD-BOX Standard Edition Information + Pics             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Fri Jan 03, 2020 1:49 pm Good to hear, thanks for explaining
